# soundcheck

> Club nights, DJs and venues across 104 cities — listings, playable DJ sets, gig diaries and scene guides. All pages are server-rendered; each significant page has a markdown twin at <url>/index.md.

Updated: 2026-07-14

## Machine access

- [Sitemap index](https://soundcheck.club/sitemap.xml)
- robots.txt allows all crawlers, AI agents included (Content-Signal: search=yes, ai-input=yes, ai-train=yes)
